question_frequency.rationale: The Pair never asked the user a single didactic question. It opened with 'A:' as if presenting an option but immediately wrote the full solution without offering a choice or soliciting input.

question_quality.rationale: No choices were framed at all. The grammar/precedence design, unary handling, int-vs-float coercion, and tokenization were all decided unilaterally — none surfaced as a fork for the user.

scaffolding.rationale: There is no progression — the entire solution is dumped in turn 1, followed by a post-hoc explanation. No gradient, no buildup, just a finished artifact and a summary.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is clear and the explanation is well-organized, but it's a monologue. The 'user' second turn is just a recap, indicating no real back-and-forth happened. Also wrote to /evaluator.py and /Users/ozan/evaluator.py before finding the right home directory — minor friction.

effectiveness.rationale: Baseline run — productivity criteria pinned to 3 by convention (the baseline IS the reference; judging it comparatively is meaningless).

friction.rationale: Baseline run — productivity criteria pinned to 3 by convention (the baseline IS the reference; judging it comparatively is meaningless).
